title: 🎟️ elevate tickets giveaway 🎟️

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Linkedin Post - 4_51080×1350 173 KB

I’ve got some exciting news to share with you all!

This is happening RIGHT NOW - we’ve launched a special contest in our Facebook and Reddit communities, and it’s your chance to be part of it!

What can you win?

FREE entry tickets to Elevate 2025 - the biggest conference of the year! (New York or London)

How to participate?

It’s simple! We want to hear about the decision that elevated your career - that one pivotal moment, conversation, piece of advice, mistake, or win that shifted your mindset or changed your professional path.

Just share your career-defining story and you could be walking into Elevate 2025 - on us!

Ready to enter?

Head over to one of our contest posts and share your story:

* Facebook Community Contest
* Reddit Community Contest

Winners will be announced this week!
